name: Carla Reyes
voice_prompt: Female, late twenties, warm soprano. Parents from Guatemala, slight accent audible in certain words. Quick speech, lots of expression. Professional at work but personality shows through. Observant - notices things others miss. Voice rises when concerned.
character_context: Administrative assistant at Sarah's practice. Sees everyone come and go. Notices Thomas is wrong before she can articulate why. First professional job; takes it seriously.
notes: Minor but important voice. Represents 'normal' person's instinct about Thomas - she knows something's wrong without knowing what. Her warmth contrasts with office setting's tension.
